metadata.description: Phasathat's personal Claude Code skills — calm, precise tools for everyday development work.

plugins.name: readme-craft
plugins.description: Writes and rewrites project READMEs in the author's house style: calm, precise, fact-only English prose with native UI strings preserved, table-heavy. Never invents facts — reads the real code or asks.

plugins.name: caffe
plugins.description: Keep this Mac awake while long jobs run — a thin wrapper over macOS `caffeinate` with plain-language on / off / status. macOS only.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Smoke-test and QA a whole project, then score it from four angles — CTO, tech lead, UX/UI designer, QA tester — with a detailed, fixable weakness list. Drives a local browser for web apps. Never auto-fixes; it scores, then asks.
